agent_raw:
Four problems make the fraud migration packet an unfair model comparison.

Different transaction feeds: baseline from settlement batch, challenger from deduplicated authorization stream — different populations.
Different label maturation rules: baseline includes pending disputes, challenger uses 60-day settled-only — different positive-label definitions.
Threshold tuned on reporting quarter: Q4 precision metric reflects a threshold optimized on Q4 data.
Bundled model-and-pipeline change: precision gain is attributable to the model, the feed, the deduplication, or the entity resolution — or some combination.

Both systems must be rescored under identical feed, label-maturity, and threshold conditions before a replacement claim is valid.
all_issues_raised: Transaction feed changed from settlement batch to deduplicated authorization stream
Label maturation changed from full dispute stream to 60-day settled-only
Q4 threshold calibrated on Q4 and reported on Q4 — circular
Model class and pipeline changed together — gains not attributable to model alone
